Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT upgrade.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade JOIN (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade = 0) AS baseline ON baseline.bldg_id = upgrade.bldg_id AND baseline."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = upgrade."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND baseline.state = upgrade.state 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND upgrade.applicability = true AND true GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/ca219ca510f0d60f85022bf2c069c40749eff5b2f1231b4a28fb55fb6b95d6b1/5234a54f-2999-4a04-8e65-21914e2eed12/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
